user.title: Instance basics
user.description: Choose a name and the target light (or light group) to control.

device.title: ZHA remote
device.description: Select the Zigbee button/remote device from the ZHA integration.

capture.title: Capture button press
capture.description: Press the desired physical button on {device}, then click Submit.

steps_count.title: Brightness steps
steps_count.description: Off is always included as the first step. Choose how many "On" steps you want.

steps.title: Configure steps
steps.description: Define a label and brightness percentage for each On step.

error.no_press: No button press detected yet. Press the button, then try again.
error.not_zha_device: The selected device is not a ZHA device.
error.invalid_event: The captured event did not include enough data to identify the button.
error.invalid_step_count: Choose a number of steps between 1 and 8.
